idea_title: India ka sabse mysterious village ke peeche ki asli kahani
hook: Kya aap jaante ho is kahani ka sach kuch aur hi tha?
script: Kya aap jaante ho is kahani ka sach kuch aur hi tha?
India me kuch jagah aisi hain jinke baare me log kam baat karte hain.
Lekin un jagahon ke peeche ki kahani kabhi kabhi bahut dark hoti hai.
Aaj ki story me hum dekhenge ek aisi mystery jahan sach aur afwah ke beech line dhundhli ho jati hai.
Aur end me aap decide karna — ye sirf kahani thi ya kuch aur?

idea_title: FactTechz style me ek dark mystery short
hook: Ye incident sunke aap raat ko sochne par majboor ho jaoge.
